evidence: 關於個人法益的犯罪4＝財產法益

Zero Hunger.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus relates to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly covers 'Crimes against life' (侵害生命法益之罪) and 'Crimes against the body' (侵害身體法益之罪), directly relating to reducing mortality and promoting well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university-level law course, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and imparts specialized professional knowledge in criminal law (Target 4.4).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The study of criminal law inherently supports the equal application of the law, which is a foundation for Target 10.3 (ensure equal opportunity and reduce inequalities of outcome).
